title: Deck config
description: Selects which card-deck content the build loads. Loaders read this file at module load. Set VITE_DECK env var to override `active` at build time (useful for A/B builds and CI matrices).

active.description: Deck id loaded by default. Must match one of `decks[].id`. Env var VITE_DECK overrides this.

default.description: Fallback deck id when `active` is absent or invalid.

id.description: Stable identifier (used by VITE_DECK and by loaders).

path.description: Folder name under `card-decks/` containing the deck JSON files.
